Hero.title: Arrive in effortless comfort
Hero.subtitle: Private airport transfers, chauffeured travel and curated tours across Türkiye — a fixed price, a warm welcome and a driver waiting the moment you land.

Booking.hourlyNote: Keep your chauffeur and vehicle for as long as you need.
Booking.toursNote: Discover our most-loved experiences with a private guide.

Trust.title: Travel that takes care of the details
Trust.subtitle: From the tarmac to your door, every journey is private, punctual and priced up-front.

fixedPrice.title: Fixed-price guarantee
fixedPrice.desc: The fare you see is the fare you pay — no surge pricing, no detours, no surprises.

meetGreet.title: Meet & greet
meetGreet.desc: Your driver waits in arrivals with a name sign and tracks your flight for delays.

freeCancellation.title: Free cancellation
freeCancellation.desc: Plans change. Cancel up to 6 hours before pick-up for a full refund.

support.title: 24/7 concierge
support.desc: Real people on WhatsApp, day or night, in your language.

Tours.title: How about a beautiful tour?
Tours.subtitle: Unforgettable itineraries and tailor-made adventures, guided by locals who love this city.

Locations.title: Popular destinations
Locations.subtitle: The routes our guests book most across Istanbul and Türkiye. Tap a category to see indicative fares.
Locations.note: Prices are indicative one-way fares for a standard sedan and may vary by date and vehicle class.

Vip.title: Privileged moments, warm hospitality
Vip.subtitle: Beyond the transfer — a suite of VIP services designed around how you like to travel.

meetGreet.title: VIP meet & assist
meetGreet.desc: Fast-track welcome, porter assistance and a seamless walk to your vehicle.

fleet.title: Luxury fleet
fleet.desc: Mercedes E-Class, V-Class and Sprinter vehicles, immaculately maintained.

chauffeur.title: Private chauffeur
chauffeur.desc: Discreet, professional English-speaking drivers at your disposal.

security.title: Helicopter, jet & security
security.desc: Helicopter and private-jet transfers plus close-protection on request.

Gallery.title: Privileged moments, beautiful company
Gallery.subtitle: A glimpse of the journeys we design for guests from around the world.

Testimonials.title: Loved by travellers worldwide
Testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of five-star journeys and counting.

one.quote: Our driver was waiting the second we landed, the car was spotless and the price was exactly as quoted. Flawless from start to finish.
one.author: Sofia M.

two.quote: Booked a full-day Bosphorus tour — our guide was warm, knowledgeable and completely tailored the day to us. Unforgettable.
two.author: Ahmed R.

three.quote: 24/7 WhatsApp support answered in minutes when our flight changed. This is how airport transfers should feel.
three.author: Elif & Deniz

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need for a smooth journey. Still curious? Our team is one message away.

Cta.title: Ready when you land
Cta.subtitle: Reserve your private transfer in under two minutes — fixed price, free cancellation and a driver who is always on time.

Footer.tagline: Private airport transfers, chauffeured travel and curated tours across Türkiye.

About.title: Hospitality is our native language
About.subtitle: We turn the most stressful part of any trip — arrivals and transfers — into the calmest.
About.lead: {siteName} was founded on a simple belief: that travel should begin the moment you land, not after a long queue for a taxi.
About.body: From a single airport pick-up to multi-day chauffeured itineraries, our licensed drivers and local guides share one obsession — looking after you. Every vehicle is privately owned, every price is fixed in advance, and every journey is tracked by a team that never sleeps.

care.title: Guest-first care
care.desc: We treat every arrival like a guest in our own home.

trust.title: Transparent pricing
trust.desc: One fair price, agreed before you travel. Always.

local.title: Local expertise
local.desc: Licensed guides and drivers who know Türkiye by heart.

safety.title: Safety first
safety.desc: Insured vehicles, vetted chauffeurs, real-time tracking.

collective.title: A collective of passionate minds driven by purpose
collective.body: Travel is more than visiting new places — it's about creating stories that stay with you forever. From the very beginning, our mission has been to craft journeys that celebrate culture, comfort and connection.

story.title: A journey of dreams and challenges
story.subtitle: A decade of turning arrivals into welcomes and routes into memories.

About.partners: Trusted by discerning travellers and partners worldwide

team.title: Meet the experts behind your adventures
team.subtitle: A team united by a love for travel and a commitment to excellence.

Business.title: Corporate & partner travel, simplified
Business.subtitle: Reliable ground transport for teams, events and agencies — with consolidated billing and a dedicated account manager.

billing.title: Consolidated billing
billing.desc: One monthly invoice for every journey, with per-trip cost centres.

manager.title: Dedicated manager
manager.desc: A single point of contact for bookings, changes and reporting.

priority.title: Priority dispatch
priority.desc: Guaranteed vehicles for events, roadshows and VIP delegations.

api.title: Agency rates & API
api.desc: Net rates for travel agencies and an API for seamless integration.

Business.formSubtitle: Tell us about your travel needs and we'll be in touch within one business day.

Vehicles.title: The right vehicle for every journey
Vehicles.subtitle: Privately owned, immaculately kept and chosen to match your party size and style.

MeetingPoints.title: Where we'll meet you
MeetingPoints.subtitle: Clear, stress-free meeting instructions for every major airport we serve.

land.title: You land
land.desc: We track your flight in real time — early or delayed, your driver adjusts.

meet.title: We meet you
meet.desc: Your driver waits at arrivals holding a sign with your name.

relax.title: You relax
relax.desc: We carry your bags and walk you to a waiting, climate-controlled vehicle.

Contact.title: We're here around the clock
Contact.subtitle: Questions, custom itineraries or last-minute changes — reach us however suits you best.

form.name: Full name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Thank you — your message is on its way. We'll reply shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us on WhatsApp.

BookingPage.title: Book your transfer
BookingPage.subtitle: A few quick details and your private driver is confirmed. Fixed price, free cancellation up to 6 hours before pick-up.
BookingPage.estNote: Final price is confirmed by email before any payment is taken.

success.title: Request received
success.body: Thank you, {name}. We've received your transfer request and will confirm by email within minutes.

BookingPage.error: We couldn't submit your request. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.

Meta.description: Private airport transfers, chauffeured travel and curated tours across Istanbul and Türkiye. Fixed prices, meet & greet, free cancellation and 24/7 support.

home.title: Private Istanbul Airport Transfers & Tours
home.description: Book a private airport transfer in Istanbul with a fixed price, meet & greet and free cancellation. Chauffeured travel and curated tours across Türkiye, 24/7.

tours.title: Istanbul Tours & Experiences
tours.description: Private guided tours across Istanbul and Türkiye — Bosphorus cruises, historic peninsula walks, Princes' Islands and more, with licensed local guides.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn how {siteName} makes airport arrivals and transfers across Türkiye effortless — privately owned fleet, fixed prices and 24/7 care.

business.title: Corporate & Agency Travel
business.description: Reliable corporate ground transport with consolidated billing, priority dispatch, agency net rates and a dedicated account manager.

vehicles.title: Our Fleet
vehicles.description: Mercedes E-Class, V-Class and Sprinter vehicles for every party size — privately owned and immaculately maintained.

meetingPoints.title: Airport Meeting Points
meetingPoints.description: Clear meet & greet instructions for Istanbul (IST), Sabiha Gökçen (SAW), Antalya, Bodrum, Izmir and Dalaman airports.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers about pricing, cancellations, meet & greet, luggage, child seats and payments for your private transfer or tour.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Reach our 24/7 concierge by phone, email or WhatsApp for bookings, custom itineraries and support.

booking.title: Book a Transfer
booking.description: Reserve your private airport transfer in minutes — fixed price, free cancellation and a driver who is always on time.
